description_long: This is a well-dressed adult male figure wearing a tailored three-piece suit, complete with a vest, tie, and pocket square. The figure has a neatly groomed beard and short, styled hair, and is accessorized with sunglasses. The suit is fitted, with visible lapels, buttons, and creases, and the shoes are formal and polished. The hands are relaxed and open at the sides, and the overall build is average and proportionate. The figure exudes a professional, urban appearance suitable for business or formal city environments.
description: A sharply dressed adult male in a three-piece suit with sunglasses, exuding a professional and urban vibe.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full suit, tie, sunglasses, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile, suit fit, and shoe details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the suit, hair, and shoe heels.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and suit contours.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with vest, dress shirt, tie, and pocket square
